format: test-only, 36311 rows, front_id,target_value, order as test_apps.csv, target_value %.10f

generation.blend: champion_rank*0.10 + catboost_no_month_rank*0.25 + xgb_no_month_rank*0.65 (rank percentile on test)

selection.method: offline three-way late-holdout scan, lh_min gated >= current best A; no leaderboard

known_risks: Calendar (no_month) features extrapolate to unseen public/private months; late-holdout is in-train-range proxy.
Gain +0.0009 lh_mean; at ~27x amplification expected ~+0.025 public, near signal threshold.
Weights selected offline by late-holdout, no leaderboard probing.
amplification_note: no_month подтвердил усиление offline lh_mean -> public ~27x (76.388->76.505 от +0.0043).
